title: Location · core (FHIR Location resource → OMOP location)
notes:
Edge Location__location: the standalone FHIR Location *resource* → cdm_ours_fhir.location. DISTINCT from Patient__location, which derives a location row from Patient.address; this edge maps a first-class Location resource via its own address + position.

Column mapping, grounded in mapspec/views/Location__location.view.json (stage-1 flatten) + mapspec/etl/Location__location.sql (stage-2):

  location_id           = referenceToId(Location.id)            -- surrogate PK, NOT asserted (derived from the resource id)
  address_1             = left(address.line.join(' '), 50)
  address_2             = NULL                                  -- hardcoded NULL in the SQL
  city                  = left(address.city, 50)
  state                 = NULL                                  -- hardcoded NULL in the SQL (NOT address.state!)
  zip                   = left(address.postalCode, 9)
  county                = NULL                                  -- hardcoded NULL
  location_source_value = left(address.state, 50)               -- NB: FHIR address.state lands HERE, not in `state`
  country_concept_id    = COALESCE(cm.country_iso_to_omop.concept_id, 0)
  country_source_value  = left(address.country, 80)
  latitude              = position.latitude::numeric
  longitude             = position.longitude::numeric

KEY GOTCHA verified against the live cdm_ours_fhir.location for the real Synthea Location a61711be-... (CAREWELL URGENT CARE): FHIR address.state='MA' flows to location_source_value='MA', while the OMOP `state` column stays NULL (the stage-2 SQL writes NULL::varchar to `state` and left(v.state,50) to `location_source_value`). This looks backwards but is the actual pipeline behavior — covered explicitly in variant (a).

cm.country_iso_to_omop (5 rows in the live DB: AU/CA/DE/GB/US): US → concept_id 4330442 'United States of America' (vocab.concept 4330442, domain Geography, vocabulary SNOMED — verified). Any country NOT in the 5-row map (or absent) → COALESCE(...,0) → country_concept_id 0 ('No matching concept').

Variants:
  (a) full address + position, country US — the real CAREWELL Synthea Location, values copied verbatim from cdm_ours_fhir.location.
  (b) minimal Location: no address, no position (the real 'Patient's Home' kind Location bb1ad573-...) → every column NULL except the surrogate PK and country_concept_id=0; values copied from the live row.
  (c) full address but an UNMAPPED country (FR not in cm.country_iso_to_omop) → country_concept_id 0 yet country_source_value='FR' preserved (the source value is kept even when the concept doesn't resolve).

Each Location emits exactly ONE location row and nothing else. The location_id surrogate PK = referenceToId(Location.id) is not asserted (derived). The sibling edge Location__care_site does not run here because no care_site target is listed (the runner filters edges to expected ∪ primary targets), and Patient__location does not run because no Patient resource is present.

cases.desc: (a) full address + position, country US — real CAREWELL Synthea Location: address.state 'MA' → location_source_value (NOT `state`, which stays NULL), country US → country_concept_id 4330442

fhir.name: CAREWELL URGENT CARE CENTERS OF MA, PC

cases.desc: (b) minimal Location: no address, no position (real 'Patient's Home' kind Location) → every column NULL except surrogate PK and country_concept_id 0
(c) full address but UNMAPPED country (FR not in cm.country_iso_to_omop) → country_concept_id 0, but country_source_value 'FR' preserved
